title: Boudin and Blanc Gooey Breakfast Bake
description: A savory, gooey breakfast dish featuring boudin sausage and a rich blanc sauce.
instructions: Cut the boudin sausage into 1-inch pieces and cook in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the cooked sausage to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Pour the blanc sauce over the sausage, followed by the shredded gooey cheese.
Arrange the poke bread cubes on top of the cheese.
Drizzle the Turkish butter over the bread.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
